utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item includes a description and explicit costs (monthly and annual for the first four, and totals for the budget). The format requirement is that each category specify coverage with costs; the plan provides costs for each and totals. Therefore, all items are included and specified with the necessary cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists descriptions that correspond to specific items in the ground-truth ratings. Map each described plan/add-on to its exact named item and pull the rating number. Health coverage mentions LifeFirst Standard Plan including mental health services, so map to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9). Property coverage cites InsurePlus Standard Coverage for Home Content with Technology Protection; the base property policy is property_protection.home_content.InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 10). Travel coverage cites LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan with Adventure Travel Coverage; the base travel policy maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9) and the add-on maps to travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10). Additional services says Premium Liability Coverage for creative professionals, which has no corresponding ground-truth item, so it is omitted. Total budget is not an item with a rating.
